languages.text: Изимонда к убийству подтолкнула Камилла. Необходимо выяснить, зачем герцогиня затеяла этот заговор.

traits.locale_text: Изимонда к убийству подтолкнула Камилла. Необходимо выяснить, зачем герцогиня затеяла этот заговор.

languages.text: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.
languages.original_text: Изимонда к убийству подтолкнула Камилла. Необходимо выяснить, зачем герцогиня затеяла этот заговор.

languages.text: Isimond wurde von Camilla angestachelt, den Mord zu begehen. Nun gilt es herauszufinden, warum die Herzogin diese Intrige in Gang gesetzt hat.
languages.original_text: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.

traits.locale_text: Isimond wurde von Camilla angestachelt, den Mord zu begehen. Nun gilt es herauszufinden, warum die Herzogin diese Intrige in Gang gesetzt hat.

languages.text: C'est Camilla qui a poussé Isimond à commettre le meurtre. Il faut découvrir pourquoi la duchesse a fomenté cette conspiration.
languages.original_text: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.

traits.locale_text: C'est Camilla qui a poussé Isimond à commettre le meurtre. Il faut découvrir pourquoi la duchesse a fomenté cette conspiration.

languages.text: 伊西蒙德是在卡米拉的怂恿下才去杀人的。必须查明这位女爵为何要策划这场阴谋。
languages.original_text: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.

traits.locale_text: 伊西蒙德是在卡米拉的怂恿下才去杀人的。必须查明这位女爵为何要策划这场阴谋。

languages.text: Camilla incitó a Isimond a perpetrar el asesinato. Hay que esclarecer la razón que llevó a la duquesa a conspirar de este modo.
languages.original_text: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.

traits.locale_text: Camilla incitó a Isimond a perpetrar el asesinato. Hay que esclarecer la razón que llevó a la duquesa a conspirar de este modo.

languages.text: イシモンドはカミラによって殺人に駆り立てられた。公爵夫人がなぜこんなことを企んでいるのか、その理由を突き止める必要がある。
languages.original_text: Isimond was driven to murder by Camilla. We need to find out why the Duchess is plotting this.

languages.text: İsimond'u cinayeti işlemeye teşvik eden Camilla'ydı. Düşesin bu komployu neden harekete geçirdiği belirlenmeli.
languages.original_text: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.
